title: Availability of required equipment and instruments

report.pass: Mean availability of required equipment is {actual}% against the minimum requirement of {expected}% - fulfilling.
report.fail: Mean availability of required equipment is {actual}% against the minimum requirement of {expected}% - not fulfilling.
report.missing: Equipment availability could not be determined - manual verification required.

title: Aadhaar Enabled Biometric Attendance System (AEBAS)
regulationRef: NCISM biometric attendance requirement, MESAR (UG) Sowa-Rigpa 2023

report.pass: Aadhaar Enabled Biometric Attendance System is implemented and functional.
report.fail: Aadhaar Enabled Biometric Attendance System is not implemented or not functional.
report.missing: AEBAS implementation status could not be determined - manual verification required.
